questions.question: According to the decision tree, when should you use a Pinia store instead of a composable?
options: When you need to use TypeScript in the store logic
When multiple unrelated components share state that must survive navigation
Whenever you have async operations in your state logic
When the composable file exceeds 100 lines of code

questions.question: What is the key behavioral difference between a shared composable (state outside the function) and a regular composable?
options: Shared composables cannot use watch or computed
Shared composables expose all state — each consumer gets its OWN instance
All consumers of a shared composable share the same reactive state instance
Regular composables are auto-imported; shared composables are not

questions.question: What is the main risk of using a module-scope shared composable for state in Nuxt during SSR?
options: Module-scope state leaks between server requests across different users
It cannot be used inside <script setup>
Hot module replacement won't work with it
